home.startListDesc: Create a destination before you queue any source URLs.
home.deleteConfirm: "%{name}" and its %{count} sources will be permanently removed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.providerRequired: Required. Without a provider, LLM requests cannot start.
settings.modelRequired: Required. Missing model selection breaks summary and chat generation.
settings.apiKeyRequired: Required for hosted providers. Missing credentials break remote inference.
settings.openaiBaseUrlHint: Required. Use your OpenAI API base URL so health checks can reach /models.
settings.anthropicBaseUrlHint: Required. Use the Anthropic API base URL so health checks can reach /models.
settings.ollamaBaseUrlHint: Required. Use your Ollama server root so health checks can reach /api/tags.
settings.baseUrlHint: Required. Use your OpenAI-compatible provider base URL so health checks can reach /models.
settings.outputLanguageDesc: Controls the language of AI-generated notes and responses.
settings.embeddingModelMissing: If missing, the first processing run downloads embeddings before indexing, which makes startup slower.
settings.backendRequired: Required. If the backend is offline, the web app cannot load or save configuration.
settings.workerConcurrencyDesc: Controls parallel jobs. Higher values improve throughput but increase local resource usage.
settings.ffmpegRequired: Required. Without FFmpeg, media audio cannot be extracted, so ingestion fails.
settings.modelSizeRequired: Required. Missing the Whisper model blocks transcript generation entirely.
settings.cudaAvailable: CUDA speeds up transcription. Without it, transcripts still run but take longer on CPU.
settings.cudaUnavailable: CUDA is unavailable, so transcription will run on CPU.
settings.languageDesc: Controls decoder accuracy. A wrong language setting can reduce transcript quality.
settings.modelDownloadsRequired: Whisper model files are required. If missing, transcription cannot start until a model is downloaded.
